roles.title: Product Manager
roles.summary: Defines product vision, strategy, and roadmap while aligning engineering, design, and business stakeholders to deliver user and business value.
responsibilities: Define product vision, strategy, and roadmap
Prioritize features and manage the backlog
Conduct market and competitive research
Write requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria
Lead cross-functional execution and launches
Measure product metrics and iterate based on data

roadmap.title: Associate Product Manager
roadmap.focus: Learn fundamentals, support backlog and user research

roadmap.title: Product Manager
roadmap.focus: Own a product area, define roadmap, and lead launches

roadmap.title: Senior Product Manager
roadmap.focus: Drive strategy, mentor PMs, and own key metrics

roadmap.title: Director of Product
roadmap.focus: Lead product domain and align with company strategy

roadmap.title: VP / Chief Product Officer
roadmap.focus: Set company-wide product vision and portfolio

interactions.description: Collaborate on feasibility, scope, and delivery.
Align on user needs and design solutions.
Present roadmap, metrics, and strategic bets.

resources.title: Inspired
resources.description: Classic product management principles by Marty Cagan.

resources.title: Cracking the PM Interview
resources.description: Interview and career guide for PMs.

resources.title: Lenny's Newsletter
resources.description: Product advice and frameworks from Lenny Rachitsky.

roles.title: Product Marketing Manager
roles.summary: Bridges product, marketing, and sales to craft positioning, messaging, and go-to-market strategies that drive adoption and revenue.
responsibilities: Develop positioning, messaging, and value propositions
Plan and execute product launches
Conduct market, competitor, and customer research
Create sales enablement content and training
Collaborate on pricing and packaging
Track campaign performance and optimize GTM

roadmap.title: Associate Product Marketing Manager
roadmap.focus: Support launches, research, and content creation

roadmap.title: Product Marketing Manager
roadmap.focus: Own product launches and messaging for a product line

roadmap.title: Senior Product Marketing Manager
roadmap.focus: Lead portfolio strategy and drive revenue impact

roadmap.title: Director of Product Marketing
roadmap.focus: Build team and align GTM with company goals

roadmap.title: VP Marketing / CMO
roadmap.focus: Own global marketing and brand strategy

interactions.description: Enable reps with collateral, training, and competitive intel.
Gather feedback and identify expansion opportunities.

bestPractices: Iterate based on sales and customer feedback

resources.title: Crossing the Chasm
resources.description: Framework for bringing tech products to market.

resources.title: SaaStr
resources.description: B2B SaaS growth and marketing insights.

roles.title: UX/UI Designer & User Researcher
roles.summary: Researches user needs, designs intuitive interfaces, and validates solutions to create seamless digital experiences.
responsibilities: Conduct user interviews, surveys, and usability tests
Create personas, journey maps, and wireframes
Design high-fidelity interfaces and prototypes
Build and maintain design systems
Collaborate with product and engineering
Validate designs with iterative user feedback

roadmap.title: Junior UX/UI Designer
roadmap.focus: Learn design tools, support research and wireframes

roadmap.title: UX/UI Designer
roadmap.focus: Own design tasks and run usability tests

roadmap.title: Senior Product Designer
roadmap.focus: Lead end-to-end product design and mentor juniors

roadmap.title: Lead UX / Design Manager
roadmap.focus: Drive design strategy and team processes

roadmap.title: Director / VP of Design
roadmap.focus: Shape design culture and org-wide UX vision

interactions.description: Align user problems with product priorities.
Hand off designs and collaborate on feasibility.
Ensure UI copy and docs are clear.
Synthesize insights that inform design decisions.

bestPractices: Start with user research, not pixels

resources.title: Don't Make Me Think
resources.description: Classic usability book by Steve Krug.

roles.title: Technical Writer
roles.summary: Creates clear, accurate documentation and enablement content that helps users adopt and succeed with the product.
responsibilities: Write and maintain product and API documentation
Create onboarding guides, tutorials, and FAQs
Collaborate with engineers and PMs on release docs
Validate accuracy through hands-on testing
Maintain information architecture and navigation
Use analytics to improve content quality

roadmap.title: Junior Technical Writer
roadmap.focus: Write clear docs and learn product basics

roadmap.title: Technical Writer
roadmap.focus: Own documentation areas and release notes

roadmap.title: Senior Technical Writer
roadmap.focus: Lead doc strategy, IA, and quality standards

roadmap.title: Documentation Lead / Principal
roadmap.focus: Govern docs-as-code systems and mentor writers

roadmap.title: Director / Head of Documentation
roadmap.focus: Own global documentation strategy and operations

interactions.description: Review technical accuracy and validate examples.
Align docs with roadmap and feature releases.
Ensure consistent terminology and in-product copy.
Turn ticket themes into helpful docs.

bestPractices: Write for the reader's task, not the product
Keep docs accurate, concise, and scannable
Measure and improve based on user feedback

resources.title: Docs-as-Code
resources.description: Approach for managing docs with developer tools.

resources.title: I'd Rather Be Writing
resources.description: Technical writing blog by Tom Johnson.

resources.title: Google Developer Documentation Style Guide
resources.description: Widely used writing and style reference.
